pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates the 'security-triage' channel where the initial CVE report is injected.
setup_task.sh creates user 'security.researcher' as 'Alex Chen (External Researcher)'.
setup_task.sh creates users 'core.maintainer', 'release.manager', and 'lib.author'. verifier.py also hardcodes these as MAINTAINERS.
setup_task.sh creates users 'enterprise.consumer', 'cloud.vendor', and 'distro.maintainer'. verifier.py also hardcodes these as DOWNSTREAM.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task operates on a synthetically generated Rocket.Chat environment populated by setup_task.sh. The initial CVE report is injected into the 'security-triage' channel. The task requires coordinating with the 'security.researcher' user, a set of maintainers ('core.maintainer', 'release.manager', 'lib.author'), and downstream consumers ('enterprise.consumer', 'cloud.vendor', 'distro.maintainer'). All these users and channels are explicitly created in the setup scripts and matched by the verifier logic.
